name: io.github.vaquarkhan/mcp-test-harness
title: MCP Test Harness
description: Pytest-style testing framework and mcp-test CLI: automated discovery, parallel runs, assertions, schema checks, and CI reports (JUnit/JSON/HTML) for MCP servers over stdio, SSE, or streamable HTTP. Developer tooling; connects to your server process—this package is not an MCP server implementation.
